items.caption:
#CeraVePartner The only squeak I want in my morning routine is my clean mirror. 🤍 The @cerave Foaming Facial Cleanser leaves my skin feeling clean, fresh, and balanced…never squeaky or stripped. It’s been the perfect way to start my mornings. ✨
#MorningRoutine #Skincare #SkincareRoutine
items.transcript: I've partnered with CeraVe, and as someone who loves a clean home, this is the only squeak I actually want to hear. If your skin squeaks after you wash it, your barrier could be weakened. I've been using the CeraVe Foaming Facial Cleanser because it cleans away oil, dirt, and makeup without stripping my skin. It's developed with dermatologists and formulated with three essential ceramides, niacinamide, and hyaluronic acid to help support a stronger skin barrier from day one. My skin feels clean, fresh, and balanced, never tight or dry. That's exactly how I want to start my mornings, and the 19-ounce bottle is such a great value on Amazon.

items.caption:
Contrary to popular belief this is a quick & easy meal in the operation Niki house! 👩🏾‍🍳🍽️✨Cheat day but make it quick & easy! Clean… Organized… organized home…

#blackmomsofinstagram #asmr #Cleaning #cleanhome #cooking
items.transcript: Nikki, why are your videos so fast? Please slow them down. Okay, I get it. I'm sorry. All I'm trying to do is cram as much content in as I can for you guys. But you asked, so I'll deliver. You know I always start my cooking videos off with hygiene. So let's wash these hands and of course the nails. No cross-contamination over here. Despite all the comments from my previous videos saying this isn't a quick and easy meal, well it is here in the Operation Nikki house. So we're starting off by making our Mexican inspired rice. Now I'm messing and besties. Please do not come for me. I'm doing the best I can with what I got. We're a rinse your rice family to prevent any extra starch and mushy rice. And I use the finger test to measure things out for perfectly shell-y rice if you know you know. Since I'm making this rice in the Instant Pot, I'm going to saute my onions first. It's a personal preference. You do not have to. I like to coat my rice in butter, then add a little tomato sauce, sauteed onions, add some smoked paprika and chipotle seasonings with some chicken bone broth for extra protein. And this cooks perfectly in 15 minutes in my Our Place cooker. Now let's fry up some taquitos. I get mine in bulk from Costco. And if you're anything like me, you do not want to fry inside your house, have your fabric smelling like food. So I like to fry outside. I'm going to take another easy route and chop up some more veggies using my veggie chopper. Now guys, be careful with this produce. You see what's going on with these parasites sending innocent bystanders to the hospital. Thank God we started our garden because it's getting out of hand out here. Now my besties know I love to make my home and my meals into an ambience experience for my family. So I love this gold tray that keeps my veggies, sour cream, cheese and guac nice and cool. And this hot plate that keeps everything nice and warm. Husband's been out in the yard all day, so let's make him a plate. And there you have it, a quick and easy meal the Nicki way.

items.caption:
Cleaning through the grief 💔❤️‍🩹

#clean #blackmomsofinstagram #satisfying #satisfyingcleaning #cleanwithme
items.transcript: For the past few months, I've been petitioning my Bessie followers to pray for a dear friend of mine. I had DMs and even letters in the mail come in regarding my friend, so I thought I would share an update. Our friend, who we affectionately called Mishie, had a very aggressive form of cancer, and it was stage four. Mishie was a loving wife and mother of three young boys. She was a daughter, she was a friend, and she was the type of person who showed up when no one else would. I remember when I was a makeup artist, and I wanted to start one-on-one classes, she was the first to sign up, always rooting for me. But I regret to say, she passed away recently, surrounded by those who loved her. Her absence leaves a space that words could never fill. But what I will say is she was a fighter. She loved the Lord deeply, and even if she didn't understand it, her entire desire was to serve God even through her death. Oh, hi Sadie, I think your dad was calling you. Oh yeah, and she's in big trouble. She was my sister's best friend, so when my sister asked me to drive out of state to help get the house in order for her husband and children to return, I did not hesitate. We worked quickly, cleaned as much as we could, bought a few groceries, and refreshed the bedroom and the common areas in an effort to erase the sadness. It's hard to know how to show up for someone when they're grieving, but God has blessed me with a heart to serve, so that's what we did. We miss you. We love you forever, Mishie. Sleep peacefully until we meet again.

items.caption:
What you call overwhelming I call habit forming… 🧖🏾‍♀️🧽🫧✨💕We can’t pour from a empty cup can we? Day in my life... Morning Routine... Cleaning... Laundry.
#selfcareroutine #blackmomsofinstagram #cleanhome #organizedhome #asmr
items.transcript: I read so many of your comments saying, I'm exhausted watching this, or this is way too much, is this all a show? And honestly, I get it. When you see everything squeezed into a minute, it looks like I'm trying to be productive every second of the day, but that's not really what's happening here. This isn't about perfection. It's not about trying to earn my worth by checking off a list. It's simply the way I take care of myself and my home before the day gets too busy. If you know me in real life, you know this has always been me. Since I was a child, I learned from my grandmother very early on that when you look good, you feel good, and that definitely manifests physically. Drinking water, brushing my teeth, washing my face, doing my skincare, those aren't extra tasks for me. They're just part of getting ready. Making my bed isn't because it has to be perfect, it's because I love walking back into my room that feels peaceful later, and it helps to keep me productive. Clearing off my nightstand takes about 30 seconds. Lighting a candle makes my home feel nice and cozy. I know y'all know about aromatherapy. Starting a load of laundry takes less than a minute, and while it's washing, I'm free to move on with my day. None of these things feel stressful to me because they're habits now. I don't think about them, I just do them. And the best part? They actually reduce my stress. I don't spend the rest of the day staring at an unmade bed, piles of laundry, or clutter thinking, I'll just get to that later. No, this routine isn't for everyone, and that's okay. You don't have to wake up like I do to have a good morning. We all recharge differently. But for me, this isn't overwhelming, it's grounding. It's how I create peace before the responsibilities of the day happen. I am a wife and a mom of three, so that does matter. And if there's one thing I hope people take away from my videos, it's not that you should do everything I do, it's that you should find a routine that brings peace to you.

items.caption:
Sometimes the only quiet moment I get is at the end of the day…and lately I’ve been using that time to look into getting a new car. I didn’t realize you can actually shop for a car with @amazon Autos!

It’s more convenient…and a lot more doable on my schedule. #AmazonAutos #AmazonPartner
items.transcript: Okay besties, everyone's finally asleep, so I've got a second to think. And I have a secret to let you in on. I've been meaning to look into getting a new car, but I just haven't had the time. Life gets busy. Between grocery shopping for the kids, cleaning this house, and picking up after the dog, it's a lot. But wait, I just found out you can actually shop for a car with Amazon Autos. Yes, it's that same Amazon I get everything else from. I can browse different car options to see which is the best fit for me and my family, compare pricing from local dealerships, and even start things like financing all in one place. Right here at home as I wind down for the night. I can't believe I can actually car shop like this on my own time. Let this be your sign to check out Amazon Autos today.

Travel cleaning must haves & turning my hotel room into my home away from home!🧽🫧✨

#clean #scrubdaddy #cleaningmotivation #blackmomsofinstagram #HotelClean

items.caption:
Are you team clean & organized🧽🫧✨ or are you team messy?? 🤔 These are the benefits of keeping your home clean and organized! Cleaning tips… cleaning hacks…. Cleaning motivation… satisfying clean 

#cleaningroutine #blackmomsofinstagram #cleanhome #organizedhome #asmr
items.transcript: Okay, so these are my cleaning and organizing house rules as a type A, very particular wife and mom of three. For me, organizing and cleaning systems need to be in place for me to feel my best and to be the most efficient version of myself. Because like I always say, self-care is filling up the cup you pour from. And recent studies have shown the importance of a clean and organized and even aesthetic to you home and how it can impact your mental health in a positive way. I personally need every little thing in my home to have a place. This helps me tremendously because if I go to purchase something and that item doesn't have a place to live, I have to give away, donate, or discard something before I can justify the purchase or acquisition of that said thing. And I don't know if it's just me, but looking around at everything so neat and tidy gives me such a dopamine rush. It honestly makes me happy. In this crazy world we live in, I need all the happiness I can get. And your girl is what some would call a professional mortgage enjoyer. I know my fellow introverted besties feel me on that. Another thing I notice is these comments, right? Saying that I'm extra and I do way too much and when they watch my videos, they get overstimulated and they have anxiety. I'm just really curious what these individuals' homes look like. No shade to those who can't physically get up and clean and organize, but those who do have the capacity to do it and shame me for doing what I do. And everyone is entitled to the way that they feel and their preferences, but trust me, the way I take care of myself, my family, and my home isn't too much for us. You'd actually be surprised that it's not time consuming as much as you may think and keeping a tidy and organized home doesn't cost that much money either. So if you're sick of living in a disorganized, chaotic space, this is your friendly sign to get up and get it together. And I'm here to help you every step of the way. Love you. Bye.

Soft Girl Essentials. The little things that help me feel refreshed and put together. This Burt's Bees lip balm stays in every bag I own and it keeps my lips feeling smooth and moisturized all day. And the peppermint tingle? So good. And these rose water wipes are coming with me everywhere this summer. They remove makeup, refresh my skin, and make me feel put together in like 30 seconds. And Prime Day is honestly the best time to stock up. Shop my Burt's Bees Prime Day favorites on my Amazon storefront.

Then I follow with the No. 9 NAD Plus 50 Peptides Lifting Essence. A K-Beauty favorite formulated to help improve the look of wrinkles and boost elasticity.
